title: Indira IVF acquires stake in Abha Surgy Healthcare
summary: Indira IVF Hospital has acquired a stake in Abha Surgy Healthcare, which manages and operates a fertility clinic specialising in assisted reproduction under the name ‘Abha Surgy Centre’ in India. […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Abha Surgy Healthcare operates in the reproductive healthcare segment with a focus on fertility treatment and patient-centred care

Indira IVF Hospital has acquired a stake in Abha Surgy Healthcare, which manages and operates a fertility clinic specialising in assisted reproduction under the name ‘Abha Surgy Centre’ in India.

Abha Surgy Healthcare operates in the reproductive healthcare segment with a focus on fertility treatment and patient-centred care. The organisation aims to position itself as an accessible care provider offering reproductive health services across different life stages. It is led by Dr Bani Mitra, Director, who brings over three decades of experience in fertility and gynaecological care in Eastern India and has played a key role in shaping its clinical approach.

Speaking on the development, Dr Kshitiz Murdia, CEO and Whole Time Director, Indira IVF, said, “This association reflects our continued commitment to expanding access to fertility treatment while maintaining a strong focus on clinical quality and patient outcomes. Abha Surgy Centre brings with it regional presence, a legacy in reproductive healthcare, and a patient-centric approach that aligns closely with our values. Together, we see an opportunity to further strengthen how fertility services are delivered in Eastern India in a manner that is thoughtful, consistent, and accessible.”

Sharing her perspective, Surabhi Mitra, Promoter, Abha Surgy Centre, said, “At Abha Surgy Healthcare Private Limited, the journey has always been centred on providing personalised and compassionate fertility care supported by clinical expertise and trust built over the years. This association with Indira IVF marks an important new chapter for us, enabling us to further strengthen our capabilities while continuing to uphold the values that define our practice. By combining our experience with Indira IVF’s wider network and technological strengths, we look forward to supporting many more individuals and couples in their journey towards parenthood.”
